prompt: A local settlement database maintains materialized wallet totals while batches move from draft to posted to void. Fresh posting, ordinary voiding, and a rolled-back post all produce the expected totals. Production reconciliation finds three related gaps: correcting only the label of an already posted batch applies its money again, moving a posted line to a different wallet leaves value behind, and the wallet report omits dormant wallets or wallets whose only lines are void. Line corrections may change wallet and amount in one statement. The report must include every wallet with settled and draft amounts, posted metadata edits are financially inert, and void must reverse the currently assigned posted lines exactly once. Preserve the materialized totals and transaction behavior; use only the supplied SQLite schema, triggers, and query.

repo_files.sql/010_batch_state.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER apply_batch_when_posted
AFTER UPDATE ON settlement_batches
WHEN NEW.status = 'posted'
BEGIN
  UPDATE wallet_totals
  SET settled_cents = settled_cents + COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(line.cents)
    FROM settlement_lines AS line
    WHERE line.batch_id = NEW.batch_id
      AND line.wallet_id = wallet_totals.wallet_id
  ), 0)
  WHERE wallet_id IN (
    SELECT line.wallet_id
    FROM settlement_lines AS line
    WHERE line.batch_id = NEW.batch_id
  );
END;

CREATE TRIGGER reverse_batch_when_voided
AFTER UPDATE OF status ON settlement_batches
WHEN OLD.status = 'posted' AND NEW.status = 'void'
BEGIN
  UPDATE wallet_totals
  SET settled_cents = settled_cents - COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(line.cents)
    FROM settlement_lines AS line
    WHERE line.batch_id = NEW.batch_id
      AND line.wallet_id = wallet_totals.wallet_id
  ), 0)
  WHERE wallet_id IN (
    SELECT line.wallet_id
    FROM settlement_lines AS line
    WHERE line.batch_id = NEW.batch_id
  );
END;
repo_files.sql/020_posted_lines.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER apply_inserted_posted_line
AFTER INSERT ON settlement_lines
WHEN (SELECT status FROM settlement_batches WHERE batch_id = NEW.batch_id) = 'posted'
BEGIN
  UPDATE wallet_totals
  SET settled_cents = settled_cents + NEW.cents
  WHERE wallet_id = NEW.wallet_id;
END;

CREATE TRIGGER reverse_deleted_posted_line
AFTER DELETE ON settlement_lines
WHEN (SELECT status FROM settlement_batches WHERE batch_id = OLD.batch_id) = 'posted'
BEGIN
  UPDATE wallet_totals
  SET settled_cents = settled_cents - OLD.cents
  WHERE wallet_id = OLD.wallet_id;
END;

CREATE TRIGGER adjust_updated_posted_line
AFTER UPDATE ON settlement_lines
WHEN (SELECT status FROM settlement_batches WHERE batch_id = NEW.batch_id) = 'posted'
BEGIN
  UPDATE wallet_totals
  SET settled_cents = settled_cents + NEW.cents - OLD.cents
  WHERE wallet_id = NEW.wallet_id;
END;
repo_files.sql/wallet_report.sql:
SELECT
  wallet.wallet_id,
  wallet.label,
  total.settled_cents,
  COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE WHEN batch.status = 'draft' THEN line.cents ELSE 0 END
  ), 0) AS draft_cents
FROM wallets AS wallet
JOIN wallet_totals AS total
  ON total.wallet_id = wallet.wallet_id
LEFT JOIN settlement_lines AS line
  ON line.wallet_id = wallet.wallet_id
LEFT JOIN settlement_batches AS batch
  ON batch.batch_id = line.batch_id
WHERE batch.status <> 'void'
GROUP BY wallet.wallet_id, wallet.label, total.settled_cents
ORDER BY wallet.wallet_id;
